https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/1932_United_States_elections

The Republicans suffered massive defeats in both congressional chambers: Democrats gained ninety-seven seats in the House of Representatives, increasing their majority over the Republicans (achieving a House supermajority in doing so), and took control of the Senate, gaining twelve seats from the Republicans,[3] who had controlled the Senate since their electoral success in 1918
